changeSet.author: hdim
changeSet.comment: Create data_access_audit table for tracking all data access for HIPAA compliance

changeSet.author: hdim
changeSet.comment: Create database roles for role-based access control (production environments)

changeSet.author: hdim
changeSet.comment: Grant schema-level permissions to database roles

rollback.sql: REVOKE ALL ON SCHEMA public FROM cms_analytics, cms_auditor, cms_clinician, cms_admin, cms_service;

changeSet.author: hdim
changeSet.comment: Grant table-level permissions to database roles

rollback.sql: REVOKE ALL ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public FROM cms_service, cms_analytics, cms_auditor, cms_clinician, cms_admin;

changeSet.author: hdim
changeSet.comment: Enable Row-Level Security on cms_claims and claim_validation_errors for tenant isolation
